title: Kybosh Insect Killer Spray - Fast Action Fly Killer - Kills Cockroaches, Fleas, Bed Bugs and Ants - Ready to Use - Indoor Use, 400ml
features: INSECT REPELLENT: Fast acting, ready to use aerosol bug spray for the control of flies, mosquitoes, and other small flying insects
EFFECTIVE AGAINST: Offers effective control of bed bugs, cockroaches, fleas, and ants
EASY TO USE FORMULA: Long lasting formula that can be sprayed on window sills, skirting boards, and other hard surfaces
HOW TO USE: Can be sprayed directly onto insects or infested areas
SUITABLE FOR: This product can be used on carpets, curtains, and bedding (test spray small area before fully treating)
description: From the manufacturer Protect Garden Kybosh 400ml A household formula suitable for the control a wide range of flying and crawling insect pests found in the home including houseflies, mosquitoes, ants and fleas. As a residual formula it can be sprayed onto window sills, skirting boards and other hard surfaces in the home. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep away from heat/sparks/open flames/hot surfaces. - No smoking. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Do not breathe spray. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 °C/ 122 °F. Dispose of contents/container to a licensed hazardous-waste disposal contractor or collection site except for empty clean containers which can be disposed of as non-hazardous waste.
